name: Recruiter: Create a project (-EZ prefix)
description: Creates an EMPTY Recruiter project named '-EZ <position>'. Intended trigger (future, NOT wired yet): Odoo new job position → this workflow with the position name. The '-EZ' prefix marks our auto-created projects (identify/clean). PARAM = the project name (step 4 value) = '-EZ ' + position; that's the single value an Odoo trigger would override (daemon doesn't substitute runtime_params into step values yet → backend param-substitution is the prerequisite for the live trigger). Dedup (don't recreate '-EZ X') is trigger/reconciler logic, not the workflow. Selectors live-captured 2026-06-08: name input[data-test-project-name-input], Create button[data-test-create-button] (both stable). Flow: navigate /talent/create/get-started → type name → Create (which navigates to the new project page).
